text.title: Risk Threshold Policy Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: log in register; weekly digest to delivery lead; no real-time notification
ping delivery lead within 24h; brief sponsor at next standup
email sponsor within 4h with mitigation proposal; sponsor ack within 24h
phone sponsor within 2h; emergency steering call within 24h; PMO informed
named target signs off on descent; risk re-scored; new band applies
remains in current band; mitigation continues
